creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Don’t visit Edinburgh without checking out the last area I mention in this video 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

It may not be the obvious place to stay, but it’s definitely well worth walking “down” there and check out the local shops, restaurants and pubs 🙌
 If you want more Edinburgh content, I’ve got 3 videos on my Youtube and plenty of blog posts on my travel blog - for example, I’ve got a massive guide on where to stay in Edinburgh where I recommend quite a few hotels in different price ranges ✌️

Have you been to Edinburgh? What do you think about the Scottish capital?

#edinburgh #scotlandtravel #wheretostayinedinburgh

transcription.text: The best areas to stay in Edinburgh. Old Town is the area you see in 90% of the photos of Edinburgh and it truly is a magical part of town. But the downside of staying here is that it can feel a bit over touristy. New Town is a more modern part of Edinburgh and it's where you'll find the main shopping street and some very cosy pubs that the locals also go to. The hotels over here tend to be a wee bit cheaper than the ones over in the Old Town. Stockbridge is my favourite part of Edinburgh and even though it's only a 10 minute walk from the New Town it feels like a cute little Scottish village and there's so many amazing cafes, pubs and restaurants here.
